2020-2021 LSLC Board of Servant Leaders (BOSL) and Ministry Leads Read More

Vicar Hail & Farewell: Please join us on July 27th at 4pm in Klein Hall for an aloha-themed potluck to welcome Vicar Joshua and say farewell to Vicar Stephen! Let us know what you can bring using the Sign-up Genius.

Vicar Welcome Dinner: Please show your welcome to Vicar Joshua and his family with dinner (or lunch) as they get settled over the next few months. Review the available slots and sign up using the Sign-up genius or by emailing Vanessa Frost vsolt42@gmail.com.
